name: Twinkie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a pyrex square or rectangular casserole with butter.
2. Cut 8 Twinkies into thirds, lengthwise, and place one layer on the bottom of the casserole.
3. Beat egg yolks with cream of tartar and sugar in a separate bowl until foamy.
4. Add vanilla extract to the beaten yolks and mix well.
5. Melt chocolate chips in a double boiler or microwave.
6. Gradually add melted chocolate to the egg yolk mixture, stirring continuously.
7. Fold the chocolate into the egg whites until combined.
8. Spread the chocolate batter over the Twinkies in the casserole.
9. Sprinkle about half of the chopped pecans over the top layer.
10. Repeat steps 2-5 with additional layers of Twinkies, melted chocolate, and nuts.
11. Top the final layer with whipped cream and a single whole Twinkie.
12. Chill until ready to serve.
